query:
ALTER TABLE quotations 
ADD COLUMN requiresApproval BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL AFTER status,
ADD COLUMN approvalStatus ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected') AFTER requiresApproval,
MODIFY COLUMN status ENUM('draft', 'sent', 'accepted', 'rejected', 'expired', 'pending_approval', 'approval_rejected') DEFAULT 'draft' NOT NULL
